name: Monarch Casino & Resort Inc.
summary:
Monarch Casino & Resort (MCRI) reported earnings of $1.78 per share on revenue of $142.60 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.75 per share on revenue of $139.70 million. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.82 per share. The company missed expectations by 2.20% while revenue grew 4.15% on a year-over-year basis.

Monarch Casino & Resort Inc owns and operates the Atlantis Casino Resort Spa, a hotel or casino facility in Reno, Nevada; the Monarch Casino Black Hawk in Black Hawk, Colorado and real estate proximate to the Atlantis and Monarch Casino Black Hawk.
subject: Monarch Casino & Resort Missed Expectations

name: Calix, Inc.
summary:

The company said in its shareholders letter it expects third quarter non-GAAP earnings of $0.37 to $0.45 per share on revenue of $301.0 million to $307.0 million. The current consensus earnings estimate is $0.48 per share on revenue of $302.66 million for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

Calix is an appliance-based platform, cloud and managed services company.
subject: Calix Beat Expectations

subject: SmartFinancial Beat Consensus Estimates

name: Crown Holdings, Inc.
summary:
Crown (CCK) reported earnings of $2.49 per share on revenue of $3.67 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.15 per share on revenue of $3.34 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.21 per share. The company beat expectations by 12.67% while revenue grew 16.48% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of $8.30 to $8.50 per share. The company's previous guidance was earnings of $7.90 to $8.30 per share, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $8.06 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Timothy J. Donahue, Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer, stated, "The Company continued its strong 2026 performance with excellent second quarter results. Global beverage can volume growth of 5% in the quarter was driven by double-digit gains in Asia and increases of 7% and 5% in Europe and North America, respectively, which more than offset softer demand in Latin America. Second quarter segment income results also reflect robust results across the Company's beverage can equipment and North American Tinplate businesses. The Transit business performed well despite a continuing tepid global industrial production environment.

Crown Holdings Inc is engaged in the design, manufacture and sale of packaging products for consumer goods. The Company’s primary products include steel & aluminum cans for food, beverage, household and other consumer products and metal vacuum closures.
subject: Crown Beat Expectations

name: AMC Entertainment Holdings, Inc
summary:
AMC Entertainment (AMC) reported earnings of $0.14 per share on revenue of $1.60 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.01 per share on revenue of $1.48 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.03 per share. The company beat expectations by 366.67%.

AMC Chairman and CEO, Adam Aron, said, "The second quarter of 2026 was nothing short of extraordinary for AMC. In our 106-year history, never before has AMC had such superb results. In the second quarter of 2026, AMC reported higher quarterly revenue and higher quarterly Adjusted EBITDA than in any quarter in more than a century. Total revenues increased approximately 14.2%, year over year, to approximately $1.6 billion, while Adjusted EBITDA soared 70% to $321.4 million, a $131.9 million increase over last year’s same quarter. This was the first time ever that, in a quarter, AMC surpassed the $300 million mark in Adjusted EBITDA. What’s more, in the just completed second quarter, AMC generated $190.1 million in free cash flow. These record quarterly revenue and Adjusted EBITDA results are ever so satisfying. "

AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc is engaged in theatrical exhibition. It is principally involved in the theatrical exhibition business and owns, operates or has interests in theatres located in the United States.
subject: AMC Entertainment Beat Expectations

name: Domino's Pizza, Inc.
summary:
Domino's Pizza (DPZ) reported earnings of $4.07 per share on revenue of $1.19 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.11 per share on revenue of $1.18 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $3.98 per share. The company beat expectations by 2.26% while revenue grew 4.30% on a year-over-year basis.

"In the second quarter, Domino's drove meaningful order count growth," said Russell Weiner, Domino's Chief Executive Officer. "I believe order growth is the most important driver of long-term success in our business. In a quarter where the broader U.S. QSR industry continued to face pressure on consumer demand, Domino's generated order count growth across both our delivery and carryout businesses, bringing millions of new customers to our brand. These new customers strengthen our long-term growth flywheel by engaging with our loyalty program, while their orders power our supply chain business, fuel store growth, and drive market share. My conviction in Domino's long-term growth potential remains as strong as ever. Our scale and competitive position have never been stronger. Domino's is uniquely positioned to continue gaining market share and delivering long-term value for shareholders."

Domino' Pizza Inc is a chain of pizza restaurant. The Company is engaged in retail sales of food, sales of food, equipment & supplies to Company-owned & franchised Domino’s Pizza stores, & receipt of royalties & fees from Domino’s Pizza franchisees.
subject: Domino's Pizza Beat Expectations
